seoTitle: Swan Bay vs Swan Hill West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Swan Bay and Swan Hill West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Swan Bay vs Swan Hill West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Swan Bay and Swan Hill West.
heading: Swan Bay vs Swan Hill West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Swan Bay, Victoria and Swan Hill West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Swan Hill West has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Swan Bay (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Swan Bay or Swan Hill West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Swan Bay has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Swan Hill West scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Swan Bay scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Swan Hill West scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Swan Bay or Swan Hill West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Swan Hill West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
